page_metadata.biotools__summary: An R package for Stability selection. Resampling procedures to assess the stability of selected variables with additional finite sample error control for high-dimensional variable selection procedures such as Lasso or boosting.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An R package for Stability selection. Resampling procedures to assess the stability of selected variables with additional finite sample error control for high-dimensional variable selection procedures such as Lasso or boosting.
